extensionDescription.message: Lulamiso ya vugqirha ya xitayipografixi xa Xiarabi eka website ngahinya. Yi lulamisa nkarhana wa matlhetlhe, yi veka tifonti leti sasekayo ta Xiarabi, naswona yi lulamisa swiphiqo swa ku engetelela leswi vangeke mpfaparhano wa tsalwa ra Xiarabi.

masterToggleAriaLabel.message: Pfumelela kumbe u tshika xikandziyisi xa Arabic Type

letterSpacingNote.message: Nkarhana wa matlhetlhe wu vekiwa nkarhi hinkwavo eka 0 ku tivikela ku hambana ka matlhetlhe ya Xiarabi. Leswi i xona xivangelo xa le makhwini xa ku engetelela ka Xiarabi lowu vundzeke eka web.

forceRTLDescription.message: Yi ringanyeta ndlela ya ximadyambu-ya-xin'wana eka swihlovo swa tsalwa ra Xiarabi. Pfumelela eka tiwebsite laha Xiarabi xi kombisekaka hi ndlela yo hoxeka ku suka eka xin'wana ku ya eka ximadyambu.

diacriticsDescription.message: Yi antswisa ku engetelela ka swikombiso swa vukati bya Xiarabi (tashkeel) ku tivikela ku tsema la henhla ni la hansi ka rinti ra tsalwa.

siteFontOverrideLabel.message: Tirhisa fonti yo hambana eka website leyi

siteFontOverrideDescription.message: Hlawula fonti yo hambana eka website leyi ntsena, u tlula hi lehe swa xikongomelo swo hlawula fonti ya wena ya misava.

exceptionsEmpty.message: A ku na tisayiti leti tshikiweke.

fontSourceNote.message: Tifonti ti nyikiwa hi Google Fonts. Swi lava ku hlanganisiwa ka inthanete ku londla ka xo sungula.

fontPrivacyNote.message: Swikombelo swa fonti swi rhumeriwa eka tiseva ta Google. Langa fonts.google.com/privacy.

statusArabicDetected.message: Tsalwa ra Xiarabi ri kumiwe — swilo $COUNT% swi lulamisile.

statusGlobalMode.message: Ku tirhisiwa moporo ya misava hinkwayo — swihlawulekisi swa lang/dir swi kumiwe.

statusNoArabic.message: A ku na tsalwa ra Xiarabi leri kumekeke eka tluka leri.

statusContentScriptUnavailable.message: A swi koti ku fikelela eka tluka leri.
